occupation: Founder at Runor Data Consulting Ltd.
summary:
Data is not knowledge. Runes (Runor) need someone with knowledge to read, understand and interpret them.
At Runor we utilise over 35 years of knowledge acquired in the media world to the application and interpretation of data.

experiences.title: Founder
experiences.description: Expertise in the use of data for accountability and targeting in OOH and the broader media industry.  We have consistently defined the journey not merely taken it.

experiences.title: Managing Director, JCDecaux OneWorld
experiences.description: Head of the Global Sales and Marketing Division for the JCDecaux Group handling over £200m in billings directly and managing knowledge and accountability globally. A member of the strategic group in JCDecaux which developed the corporate data strategy and the independent programmatic trading platform, VIOOH.
